description_long: This is a young adult woman depicted in a casual summer outfit, featuring a sleeveless crop top with a graphic print and short shorts. She stands upright with her arms slightly bent at her sides, and her hands appear to be holding thin objects, possibly jump rope handles or similar accessories. Her footwear consists of high-heeled shoes, and her legs are bare. Her hair is styled in a high ponytail, cascading down her back. The figure's facial features are defined, and her overall build is slender and athletic. The clothing and accessories suggest a modern, urban setting.
description: A young woman in a sleeveless crop top and shorts, standing upright with a high ponytail and high-heeled shoes, holding thin objects in her hands.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, crop top with graphic print, shorts, and both hands holding thin objects.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the high ponytail, profile of the face, and the thin objects extending behind her.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ponytail, back of the crop top and shorts, and the thin objects extending from her hands.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ponytail, side profile, and the thin objects held in her right hand.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless crop top and short shorts
attribute_hairstyle: long hair in a high ponytail
